# DM Performance

> BMW specialist automotive shop in Wrightstown, New Jersey. Master-certified technician Doug Machado handles everything from routine BMW maintenance to full performance builds and race cars.

## What We Do

DM Performance is a BMW-only automotive shop serving New Jersey. We handle the full spectrum of BMW work:

- **Maintenance & Repair**: Oil service, brakes, cooling system, VANOS, timing chains, wheel bearings, electrical diagnosis, pre-purchase inspections
- **Performance Upgrades**: Coilovers, exhaust systems, ECU tuning, intake upgrades, big brake kits, intercoolers, wheel fitment
- **Engine Work**: Full engine rebuilds, engine swaps (S54, S65, B58, N54 and more), rod bearing service, head gaskets, oil leaks
- **Race & Drift Builds**: Complete drift car builds, track preparation, corner balancing, roll cage coordination, custom fabrication

## Who We Work With

BMW owners in New Jersey — from daily drivers who want reliable, quality maintenance without dealership pricing, to enthusiasts building performance cars and race machines. We work on all BMW models.

## The Shop

Doug Machado is a BMW Master Technician — BMW's highest technician certification. He also builds and competes in his own E46 M3 drift car, and has attended Formula Drift events. DM Performance is a BMW-only shop — 100% focused on one brand, which means every job gets handled by someone with deep, specific expertise.

## Why DM Performance

- BMW Master Certified — not just a general shop that sees BMWs
- Price AND quality — dealership-level work without dealership prices
- BMW only — all tools, knowledge, and focus is on BMW
